name: AYLIEN News API
what_it_does: Delivers AI-enriched news data from 80,000+ sources with pre-processed NLP metadata including entities, sentiment, topics, and summaries.
use_cases: News-driven sentiment analysis without building NLP pipeline
Entity-based news monitoring (track mentions of companies, people, places)
Topic-classified news feeds for vertical applications
Research and analytics workflows requiring structured news data
not_for: Simple headline aggregation where NLP enrichment isn't needed
Real-time alerts where NLP processing latency is a constraint
best_when: Building agents that need to reason over pre-structured news data (sentiment, entities, topics) without running their own NLP models.
avoid_when: You just need raw article metadata without NLP enrichment, or your budget doesn't support enterprise contracts.

auth.notes: Application ID and API key pair; both required in request headers

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; limits not publicly specified
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; not publicly listed
pricing.notes: Sales-led process; free trial requires account registration and approval

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Structured JSON error responses with error codes; SDK wraps errors with additional context
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only news data with NLP enrichments; safely retryable
known_agent_gotchas: Higher latency than plain news APIs due to NLP processing pipeline
Application ID + API key pair required; agents must manage two credentials
Rate limits not publicly documented; agents may hit undisclosed limits
Enterprise trial approval adds friction to agent prototyping workflows

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; dual credential model (app ID + key) adds modest security layer; GDPR compliance for EU data
